channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two boxes/bags of ice cream cones dumped opposite 53 Colomb Street, 25th March
item.description:
Two bag/boxes of ice cream cones have been dumped opposite 53 Colomb Street, SE10 9EZ. One is on the narrow bit of Colomb Street just south of the junction with Walnut Tree Road (as per one of the photos) on the outside side wall of a property. The other is in a parking space next to the children’s play area on Colomb Street as per the other photo (both can be seen from 53 Colomb Street). Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walnut Tree Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox not removed yet, 25th March
item.description:
I reported this dead fox outside 40 Sayes court road yesterday and received an email to say that your operatives couldn’t find it. Well it is still there. The public grass verge has been cut and your operatives appear to have moved the poor creature onto the path instead. This isn’t very efficient and I hope you can remedy, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Sayes Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NEW bollards needed at junction, 25th March
item.description:
We are getting regular vehicle collisions at the junction Sainsbury Road and Gipsy Hill. One of the problems is drivers don't see low down bell on approach. We need a NEW bollard installed next to the bell so drivers can clearly see the boundary of the road. This design is used on nearby junction Mountbatten Close and Gipsy Hill junction and works well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79A, Sainsbury Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt Bike, 25th March
item.description:
There is this I believe home delivery scooter that’s burnt down. This wasn’t there on Tuesday 24th. So I believe this has happened overnight and this morning 25th it was observed by everyone who walked the ground. The route takes school kids to St.Philomena’s RC school and also Harris primary school, along with dog walkers. It’s really disturbing to watch the site. Could you please check on getting this removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanton Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge 'cutter' from the council has just 'cut' these verges., 25th March
item.description:
This 'cut' was unsuccessful, and surely falls way below the standards expected. Running this service must be expensive, and we appreciate it, but not when the job is done this poorly. All he has succeeded in doing is churn up the fallen leaves from Autumn, which were never collected. Petts Wood Road used to be so smart, now it falls way behind it's prime.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HMO dumping rubbish in the street, 25th March
item.description:
Again wrong bin day now food on pavement and bins attacked by foxes. Can somebody educate the tenants of this HMO how bin days work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area needs cleaning., 25th March
item.description:
Area around the recycling banks is a complete mess. Broken fence, all types of waste on the floor, litter in the bushes, bushes uncut and unkempt.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
